# Feature timeline — EP-istifta-inquiries

How this feature has evolved. Each node is a fully-gated epic; the thread is the evolution. Artifacts are
never mutated — a change supersedes the prior owner of the artifacts it re-authors (see
[`thread-resolved.md`](./thread-resolved.md)).

```
EP-istifta-inquiries  (feature, genesis)
        │   ships: S01 (in-build), S03 (shipped, multi-repo) …
        ▼
EP-istifta-queue-filter  (defect, sev3)
            re-authors: stories + test-cases   ·   inherits: epic, architecture, contract, ui-design
            ships: S01-T01 (regression test for the queue exclusion — TC-QF-02)
```

## Nodes

### 1. `EP-istifta-inquiries` — feature (genesis) · 2026-06-04
The original feature: submit/track religious inquiries across mobile + backend. Locked the contract
surface (`sha256:4abbbbc5…`). Stories S01–S05; S01/S03 shipped.

### 2. `EP-istifta-queue-filter` — defect · sev3 · 2026-06-26
**Parent:** `EP-istifta-inquiries` · **inherits:** epic, architecture, contract (pointer-lock,
unchanged), ui-design · **re-authors:** stories, test-cases.
QA found the pending-queue exclusion was untested (the code was correct, the coverage was not). Root
cause `missing-negative-test`, escaped at the `test-cases` gate. Closed with the permanent regression
test `TC-QF-02`. **No contract re-lock** (the surface was always correct). Sealed after its S01 shipped.

## Contract re-lock history
- `2026-06-04` locked `sha256:4abbbbc5…` (genesis). No re-lock since — every later change inherited the
  surface by reference.
